title: Fix slicing of AstExprStmt nodes
body:
It fixes slicing of assignments containing `AstExprStmt` nodes.
Currently on master, `AstExprStmt` nodes are duplicated for each array element, so are their side effects. In the tests I added the number of duplicated side effects grows exponentially with respect to `depth`, because `AstExprStmt` nodes contain recursive function calls which return the whole arrays, which are sliced too.

The result expression of `AstExprStmt` has always the same value for each element, so I keep the `AstExprStmt` only in the assignment to the 1st element and for other elements I replace it with its return value.
